health-wellness.title: Health & Wellness
health-wellness.description: Mount Safety's health and wellness services focus on the active pursuit of a healthy lifestyle to enhance overall physical, mental, and social well-being. These programs are designed to integrate safety into daily life through live demonstrations and interactive learning.
health-wellness.fullContent: Our comprehensive Health & Wellness programs are designed to transition safety from a workplace requirement to a lifestyle choice. By focusing on both preventive and reactive measures, we help organizations build a resilient workforce. From basic life support to mental health and ergonomics, we cover every aspect of employee well-being.

programs.title: First Responders Course
programs.desc: Essential emergency first aid training for immediate workplace response.

programs.title: Diet & Nutrition Counseling
programs.desc: Science-based guidance for balanced nutrition and energy levels.

programs.title: Ergonomics & Stress Management
programs.desc: Optimizing workstation setup and mental resilience techniques.

programs.title: Yoga & Meditation
programs.desc: Holistic sessions to reduce workplace fatigue and improve focus.

programs.title: Women's Health & Safety
programs.desc: Specialized programs addressing unique physiological and safety needs.

benefits: Reduced workplace absenteeism
Enhanced employee morale and productivity
Immediate emergency response capabilities
Long-term wellness culture
health-wellness.standards: Global Medical Emergency Responder Standards & WHO Health Guidelines

fire-safety.title: Fire Safety
fire-safety.description: This service is dedicated to empowering individuals with the knowledge to prevent and respond to fire emergencies. The training goes beyond compliance, focusing on practical, life-saving skills for real-life industrial and commercial environments.
fire-safety.fullContent: Fire hazards are among the most serious risks in any industrial or commercial setting. Our Fire Safety programs provide hands-on experience with equipment and realistic emergency protocols. We ensure your team is not just aware of fire safety, but capable of leading others to safety during a crisis.

programs.title: Fire Extinguisher Training
programs.desc: Hands-on practice with various types of extinguishers on controlled live fires.

programs.title: Evacuation Drills
programs.desc: Simulated emergency scenarios to test and refine response times.

programs.title: Risk Assessment
programs.desc: Identifying potential ignition sources and fuel loads in your facility.

programs.title: Fire Warden Training
programs.desc: Specialized leadership training for designated safety personnel.

programs.title: System Consultancy
programs.desc: Expert advice on alarm, detection, and suppression systems.

benefits: Immediate capability to suppress minor fires
Orderly and safe building evacuations
Deep understanding of fire chemistry and prevention
Compliance with national fire safety codes
fire-safety.standards: NFPA (National Fire Protection Association) & National Building Code (NBC)

road-safety.title: Defensive Driving & Road Safety
road-safety.description: Comprehensive training designed to reduce road accidents through prevention. We instill a profound understanding of responsible behavior, hazard perception, and advanced vehicle handling techniques.
road-safety.fullContent: With road accidents being a leading cause of workplace-related fatalities, our Road Safety program is critical for corporate fleets and individual drivers. We focus on the psychology of driving, hazard anticipation, and technical skills that prevent incidents before they occur.

programs.title: Defensive Driving Techniques
programs.desc: Core skills for maintaining safety in unpredictable traffic conditions.

programs.title: Hazard Perception
programs.desc: Interactive training to identify and anticipate risks early.

programs.title: Collision Avoidance
programs.desc: Technical maneuvers to safely escape potential impact scenarios.

programs.title: Fleet Safety Management
programs.desc: Monitoring and improving driver standards across large organizations.

programs.title: Emergency Road Response
programs.desc: Immediate actions to take following a vehicular incident.

benefits: Significant reduction in vehicle collision rates
Lower insurance premiums and maintenance costs
Improved driver confidence and responsibility
Protection of the organization's mobile assets
road-safety.standards: Global Road Safety Benchmarks & Defensive Driving Standards

industrial-safety.title: Industrial Safety
industrial-safety.description: Multi-disciplinary field focusing on preventing workplace illnesses and injuries through rigorous strategies. Covers a wide range of high-risk activities from height work to chemical handling.
industrial-safety.fullContent: Today's industrial environments demand robust safety protocols. Our Industrial Safety programs address the complexity of modern manufacturing and construction. We provide technical depth in critical areas like fall protection, energy isolation, and hazardous space entry.

programs.title: LOTO (Lockout Tagout)
programs.desc: Procedures for isolating energy sources during maintenance.

programs.title: Work at Height
programs.desc: Fall protection, ladder safety, and scaffolding protocols.

programs.title: Confined Space Entry
programs.desc: Safety measures for working in restricted environments.

programs.title: HIRA
programs.desc: Advanced Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment methodologies.

programs.title: BBS (Behavioral Safety)
programs.desc: Influencing workplace culture through behavior-based insights.

benefits: Direct reduction in LTIs (Lost Time Injuries)
Technical mastery of high-risk tasks
Regulatory alignment with global site standards
Enhanced operational efficiency through safe practices
industrial-safety.standards: OSHA (Occupational Safety and Health Administration) & IS Standards

audits-inspections.title: Audits & Inspections
audits-inspections.description: Systematic procedures for gathering independent information on safety systems. We verify compliance and develop corrective action plans to ensure a zero-harm working environment.
audits-inspections.fullContent: An audit is a mirror to your organization's safety health. Our expert auditors provide an unbiased, deep-dive into your processes, infrastructure, and compliance levels. We don't just find faults; we provide clear, actionable pathways to improvement.

programs.title: EHS Compliance Audits
programs.desc: Full-spectrum environmental, health, and safety verification.

programs.title: ISO Certification Audits
programs.desc: Support for ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 standards.

programs.title: Electrical Safety Audits
programs.desc: Specialized inspection of electrical systems and grounding.

programs.title: Construction Safety Audits
programs.desc: Phased safety checks for dynamic construction sites.

programs.title: Institutional Inspections
programs.desc: Focused safety audits for schools, hospitals, and public venues.

benefits: Identification of hidden risks and liabilities
Ensured compliance with all legal and regulatory mandates
Benchmark against industry safety leaders
Detailed roadmap for continuous safety improvement
audits-inspections.standards: ISO 45001, ISO 14001 & Statutory Safety Compliance Laws

safety-equipment.title: Safety Equipment (PPE)
safety-equipment.description: Specialized training and guidance on the selection, usage, and maintenance of PPE. We ensure your final line of defense is robust and personnel are effectively protected.
safety-equipment.fullContent: PPE is only effective when it is the right equipment for the hazard and is used correctly. We provide deep expertise in selecting the appropriate gear for specific industrial risks and training workers on their maintenance and limitations.

programs.title: PPE Selection Support
programs.desc: Matching specific hazards with the correct protective gear.

programs.title: Head, Eye & Face Protection
programs.desc: Deep-dives into helmets, goggles, and face shield standards.

programs.title: Respiratory Protection
programs.desc: Fit testing and maintenance for various masking systems.

programs.title: Fall Protection Gear
programs.desc: Technical training on harnesses, lanyards, and anchor points.

programs.title: PPE Maintenance & Audits
programs.desc: Systems for tracking equipment lifecycle and integrity.

benefits: Maximum protection through correct equipment usage
Increased worker confidence and productivity
Reduced costs through proper equipment maintenance
Meeting mandatory personal safety regulations
